CHAPTER 2 PRESOLICITATION ACTIVITIES | Acquisition.GOV
 www.acquisition.gov/afars/chapter-2-presolicitation-activities     2025-07-11T00:00:00.0000000
It may be beneficial to develop a matrix that correlates the RFP sections and content to ensure consistency. Figure 2-4 illustrates how key documents and evaluation standards map to one another, showing the recommended sequencing for document preparation.
It may be beneficial to develop a matrix that correlates the RFP sections and content to ensure consistency. Figure 2-4 illustrates how key documents and evaluation standards map to one another, showing the recommended sequencing for document preparation.
5.204 Presolicitation notices. | Acquisition.GOV
 www.acquisition.gov/far/5.204     2025-10-01T00:00:00.0000000
Contracting officers must provide access to presolicitation notices through the GPE (see 15.201 and 36.213-2). The contracting officer must synopsize a proposed contract action before issuing any resulting solicitation (see 5.201 and 5.203).
